name: Artichoke Dip II
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the artichoke hearts and break them apart into smaller pieces.
2. Cut up the green chiles.
3. Mix all ingredients together in a bowl until well combined.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Pour mixture into a baking dish.
6. Bake for 30 minutes, or until heated through.
7. Serve with toasted tortilla chips.
